```{r}
pacman::p_load(
  Ipaper, data.table, dplyr, lubridate
)
```


```{r}
Forcing <- fread("Z:/GitHub/jl-pkgs/ChinaFlux2026/data-raw/BEPS/Forcing_Met_Hourly_BEPS_Forest_sp12_hourly_v20260507.csv")

FluxLAI <- fread("Z:/GitHub/jl-pkgs/ChinaFlux2026/data-raw/BEPS/Forcing_FluxLAI_Daily_BEPS_Forest_sp12_v20260506.csv")

SITES = Forcing$site %>% unique_sort()
SITE <- SITES[8]
```

```{r}
# 只有千烟洲，ET计算存在错误
foreach(SITE = SITES, i = icount()) %do% {
  d <- FluxLAI[site == SITE, ] %>% select(-site, -name)
  d[, sum(ET, na.rm = TRUE), .(year(date))]$V1 %>% mean()
}
```
